school.name: The Schoolhouse
school.description: Each teacher at the schoolhouse leads a different class in a different room. Work out who teaches what, and where.
clues: Ames' grade is exactly 4% more than the class in Period 2's grade.
Either Period 3 goes with Chess or 75% does not go with Period 5 (but not both) if and only if 79% goes with Yearbook.

Workshop goes with exactly two of Ellis, 83%, and Period 3.

Between Chess and Drama, one goes with Pavilion and the other with 79%.
Nash goes with at least three of Library, Yearbook, 75%, and Period 3.
Either Library goes with Period 4 or 79% goes with Period 1.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
clues: Boris' rating is exactly 100 more than the player who placed 4th's rating.
Either 3rd goes with Fork or 1793 does not go with 1st (but not both) if and only if 1893 goes with Zugzwang.
Nadia goes with exactly two of Pirc, Zugzwang, 1843, and 1st.

Between 1943 and 2nd, one goes with Mikhail and the other with Benoni.
Sicilian goes with exactly two of Mikhail, 1993, and 3rd.
The London player's rating is lower than both Boris' rating and the player who placed 1st's rating.
Between Fork and Gambit, one goes with Pirc and the other with 1893.
Vera goes with at least three of London, Zugzwang, 1793, and 3rd.
Either London goes with 2nd or 1893 goes with 5th.
